auth.bootstrap.body: Use the password setup flow below to bootstrap dashboard access before loading the rest of the admin UI.
auth.bootstrap.tokenConfigured: Enter the configured bootstrap token below with your new password. Depending on your setup, it may come from your server logs or CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN.
auth.bootstrap.tokenMissing: Remote setup is blocked. Set CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN on the server or restart without a password to auto-generate one.
auth.trustedHeader.title: Reverse proxy authentication required
auth.trustedHeader.body: This dashboard expects a trusted auth header from your reverse proxy. Open it through Authelia or configure a fallback dashboard password first.

settings.page.title: Settings
settings.page.subtitle: Configure appearance, auth, and API keys. Power-user tuning lives in the Advanced settings group below.
settings.page.readOnlyNotice: You are viewing the dashboard with read-only guest access. Admin controls are disabled.
settings.page.trustedHeaderNotice: Dashboard access is authenticated by a trusted reverse-proxy header. Password and TOTP stay available only as optional fallback login.
settings.page.disabledNotice: Dashboard auth is fully bypassed by configuration. Only use this mode behind network restrictions or external access control.
settings.advanced.title: Advanced settings
settings.advanced.description: Routing tuning, upstream proxies, model sources, firewall, quota planner, and sticky sessions.
settings.guestAccess.title: Guest access
settings.guestAccess.description: Share read-only dashboard visibility without admin controls.
settings.guestAccess.password.label: Guest password
settings.guestAccess.password.configured: Guest viewers must sign in with the guest password.
settings.guestAccess.password.emptyDescr: Leave unset to allow passwordless read-only guest access when enabled.
settings.resetCredits.title: Reset credits
settings.resetCredits.description: Control where reset-credit signals appear and how expiring credits are handled.
settings.resetCredits.badges.label: Show reset-credit badges
settings.resetCredits.badges.description: Show available reset-credit counts in Accounts and the top navigation.
settings.resetCredits.autoRedeem.label: Auto-redeem before expiry
settings.resetCredits.autoRedeem.descrip: Attempts to redeem the soonest reset credit about 5 minutes before it expires.
settings.resetCredits.expiryBadge.label: Show reset action expiry
settings.resetCredits.expiryBadge.descri: Show the compact remaining-time label on Accounts reset buttons.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.description: Choose how the interface looks and how time is displayed.
settings.appearance.theme.label: Theme
settings.appearance.timeFormat.label: Time format
settings.appearance.timeFormat.descripti: Apply 12h or 24h formatting to datetimes across the dashboard.
settings.appearance.accountRows.label: Account rows
settings.appearance.accountRows.descript: Choose which quota rows appear in compact account views.
settings.appearance.accountRows.fiveHour: Show only the 5h quota row when available.
settings.appearance.accountRows.weeklyDe: Show only the weekly quota row.
settings.appearance.burnProjection.label: Account burn projection
settings.appearance.burnProjection.descr: Show the account-equivalent projection card on the dashboard.
settings.routing.title: Routing
settings.routing.description: Control how requests are distributed across accounts.
settings.routing.upstream.label: Upstream stream transport
settings.routing.upstream.description: Choose how `codex-lb` connects upstream for streaming responses.
settings.routing.fastMode.label: Prohibit Fast Mode
settings.routing.fastMode.description: Send qualified Codex Fast Mode model aliases to OpenAI without the priority tier.
settings.routing.httpDownstream.label: HTTP client routing
settings.routing.httpDownstream.descript: Choose how browser and SSE callers use persistent upstream sessions.
settings.routing.strategy.label: Routing strategy
settings.routing.strategy.description: Choose how requests are distributed across accounts.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.capacity: Good default for compliant mixed-account pools; prefers accounts with more usable quota headroom.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.relative: Similar to capacity weighted, but smooths selection through a weighted draw over the strongest available accounts.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.usageWei: Spreads traffic by observed usage and can react to recent consumption patterns.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.roundRob: Cycles evenly through eligible accounts without considering quota shape.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.fillFirs: Uses one account heavily before moving on; useful for controlled drain tests, but less conservative for normal traffic.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.sequenti: Drains accounts in a fixed order. Prefer for maintenance windows, not everyday blended usage.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.resetDra: Prioritizes accounts around quota reset timing so expiring capacity is consumed first.
settings.routing.strategy.guide.singleAc: Pins all routed traffic to one selected active account.
settings.routing.strategy.safetyNote: No strategy can guarantee account-safety outcomes. For low-volume policy-compliant use, prefer capacity weighted or relative availability with sticky threads enabled so traffic stays steady and session-local.
settings.routing.stickyThreads.label: Sticky threads
settings.routing.stickyThreads.descripti: Keep related requests on the same account.
settings.routing.preferEarlier.label: Prefer earlier reset
settings.routing.preferEarlier.descripti: Bias traffic to accounts with earlier quota reset.
settings.routing.promptCacheTtl.label: Prompt-cache affinity TTL
settings.routing.promptCacheTtl.descript: Keep OpenAI-style prompt-cache mappings warm for a bounded number of seconds.
settings.routing.warmupModel.label: Warmup model
settings.routing.warmupModel.description: Set the model used by the normal warmup endpoint.
settings.routing.additionalQuota.title: Additional quota routing policies
settings.routing.additionalQuota.descrip: Override account routing for model-specific quota pools.
settings.routing.relativeAvailability.po: Raise normalized relative-availability scores to this power before weighted selection.
settings.routing.relativeAvailability.to: Keep only the strongest weighted candidates before the final random draw.
settings.routing.singleAccount.label: Selected account
settings.routing.singleAccount.descripti: Route every eligible request through one account until this setting changes.
settings.routing.singleAccount.empty: Import an account before enabling single-account routing.
settings.routing.accountCapacity.title: Per-account capacity limits
settings.routing.accountCapacity.descrip: Limit concurrent Responses work on each account. Set a limit to 0 for unlimited.
settings.routing.accountCapacity.respons: Maximum concurrent response creates per account; 0 is unlimited.
settings.routing.accountCapacity.streamD: Maximum concurrent streams per account; 0 is unlimited.
settings.routing.accountCapacity.streamR: Keep stream slots for recovery and reattach work. 0 disables the reserve; it cannot exceed a nonzero stream limit.
settings.routing.stickyThresholds.primar: Reallocate sticky sessions above this primary usage percent.
settings.routing.stickyThresholds.second: Reallocate sticky sessions above this secondary usage percent.
settings.routing.workingDays.label: Weekly pace working days
settings.routing.workingDays.description: Use these days for the dashboard weekly schedule.
settings.routing.paceSmoothing.label: Pace gap average
settings.routing.paceSmoothing.descripti: Smooth the displayed weekly pace gap over recent quota samples.
settings.routing.limitWarmup.label: Limit warm-up
settings.routing.limitWarmup.description: Send one reset-confirmed warm-up for opted-in accounts.
settings.routing.limitWarmup.resetConfir: Fires when an exhausted account's quota resets. Accounts at or above this usage before reset qualify.
settings.routing.limitWarmup.staggeredId: Pre-starts the 5h window for idle accounts before traffic arrives. Accounts at or below this usage are considered idle.
Pre-starts the 5h window for idle accounts before traffic arrives. Enable to configure.
settings.import.title: Import
settings.import.description: Control how account import handles credential slots.
settings.import.allowDuplicates.label: Allow import without overwrite
settings.import.allowDuplicates.descript: Keep separate workspace or unknown credential slots instead of replacing by email.
settings.retention.title: Data retention
settings.retention.description: Automatically prune old request logs and usage history on a background schedule.
settings.retention.requestLogs.label: Request log retention
settings.retention.requestLogs.descripti: Delete request logs older than this many days. 0 disables deletion; non-zero values need at least 30 days. Leave empty to inherit the environment value.
settings.retention.requestLogs.invalid: Request log retention must be 0 (disabled) or a whole number between 30 and 3650 days. Leave the field empty to inherit the environment value.
settings.retention.usageHistory.label: Usage history retention
settings.retention.usageHistory.descript: Delete usage history older than this many days. 0 disables deletion; non-zero values need at least 45 days. Leave empty to inherit the environment value.
settings.retention.usageHistory.invalid: Usage history retention must be 0 (disabled) or a whole number between 45 and 3650 days. Leave the field empty to inherit the environment value.
settings.session.title: Session
settings.session.description: Control how long newly issued password-backed dashboard sessions stay signed in.
settings.session.lifetime.label: Dashboard session lifetime
settings.session.lifetime.description: Absolute lifetime in hours for new password sessions. Existing sessions keep their original expiry.
settings.session.lifetime.invalid: Enter a whole number of hours (1 or more). Decimals such as <0>1.5</0> are not accepted.
settings.session.lifetime.longWarning: Lifetimes over 30 days keep admin sessions valid for a long time. That may be acceptable on a personal laptop, but it increases the impact of a leaked browser profile or stolen cookie.
settings.password.title: Password
settings.password.status.disabled: Password login is disabled by the current dashboard auth mode.
settings.password.status.fallbackConfigu: Password is configured as an optional fallback.
settings.password.setupDialog.title: Set password
settings.password.setupDialog.descriptio: Set a password for dashboard login.
settings.password.setupDialog.bootstrapT: Remote setup requires the configured bootstrap token (from server logs or CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN).
Remote setup is blocked. Set CODEX_LB_DASHBOARD_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN on the server or restart to auto-generate a token.
settings.password.changeDialog.title: Change password
settings.password.changeDialog.descripti: Enter your current password and a new one.
settings.password.removeDialog.title: Remove password
settings.password.removeDialog.descripti: Confirm your current password to remove it.
settings.password.verifyDialog.title: Verify password
settings.password.verifyDialog.descripti: Enter your password to unlock password and TOTP management.
settings.password.verifyDialog.totpDescr: Enter your TOTP code to complete verification.
settings.password.validation.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.password.validation.maxByteLeng: Password must be at most 72 bytes when encoded as UTF-8.
settings.totp.title: TOTP
settings.totp.requireLogin.label: Require TOTP on login
settings.totp.requireLogin.description: Prompt for TOTP code after password login.
settings.totp.setupDialog.title: Enable TOTP
settings.totp.setupDialog.description: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the verification code.
settings.totp.disableDialog.title: Disable TOTP
settings.totp.disableDialog.description: Enter your current TOTP code to disable two-factor authentication.
statusBar.updateAvailable: New version available. Open release notes.
statusBar.updateAvailableWithVersion: New version available: {{version}}. Open release notes.

stickySessions.description: Inspect durable mappings and purge stale prompt-cache affinity rows.
stickySessions.empty.description: Sticky mappings appear here after routed requests create them.
stickySessions.empty.title: No sticky sessions
stickySessions.emptyPage.description: The current page is empty. Use pagination to navigate to another page.
stickySessions.emptyPage.title: No sticky sessions on this page
stickySessions.purgeDialog.description: Only expired prompt-cache entries will be deleted. Durable session and sticky-thread mappings stay intact.
stickySessions.purgeDialog.title: Purge stale prompt-cache mappings
stickySessions.removeDialog.description: {{kind}} mapping {{key}} will stop pinning future requests.
stickySessions.removeDialog.title: Remove sticky session
stickySessions.table.selectAllAria: Select all sticky sessions on current page
stickySessions.title: Sticky sessions
stickySessions.toasts.deletedPartial: Deleted {{deleted}} sessions. {{failed}} could not be deleted.
stickySessions.toasts.deleteFilteredFail: Failed to delete filtered sticky sessions
stickySessions.toasts.noneFilteredDelete: No filtered sessions could be deleted
stickySessions.toasts.noneSelectedDelete: No selected sessions could be deleted

upstreamProxy.defaultPool.title: Default pool
upstreamProxy.description: Configure proxy pools used for account-bound ChatGPT upstream traffic.

upstreamProxy.poolDialog.endpointsDescri: Select the endpoints this pool routes through. You can add more later.
